text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking through the central plaza, I catch
sight of Kitasan Black surrounded by her friends.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I heard you got the highest score in the singing
test! Congrats!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
The flourishes you added brought tears to my
eyes! You were amazing, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Hm? That wasn't how I expected you to react...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume D
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, usually you'd shout "Festival time!" and
burst into song.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Well... I guess I usually do. I wonder why I'm not?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I should be really happy especially since you're all
praising me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears that fatigue may be catching up with
her. We might need to make some changes to her
schedule...
